description: Set up Vitest for packages/api, packages/db, and packages/types. Add vitest as a devDependency, create vitest.config.ts in each package, and add 'test' scripts to each package.json. Add a root-level 'pnpm test' script that runs all package tests. Ensure TypeScript paths resolve correctly.

Set up Vitest + React Testing Library for packages/web. Install vitest, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom, @testing-library/user-event, jsdom. Create vitest.config.ts with jsdom environment and setup file. Wire into the root 'pnpm test' script.

Set up Playwright for end-to-end tests. Create a top-level e2e/ directory, install @playwright/test, create playwright.config.ts targeting localhost:8080, add an 'e2e' script to the root package.json. Configure the webServer option to start both API and web dev servers.

Create a reusable test database helper for API tests. It should spin up a test transaction or use a dedicated test database (configured via TEST_DATABASE_URL), apply migrations, and provide a teardown that rolls back or truncates after each test. Export a factory for creating test users, workspaces, channels, and messages.

Create an API test harness: a helper that instantiates the Hono app, injects the test DB, and exposes a supertest-like request function. Include helpers to generate valid JWT tokens and API keys for authenticated requests. This avoids needing a running server for unit tests.

Unit tests for packages/api/src/middleware/auth.ts. Test: (1) valid JWT grants access, (2) expired JWT is rejected, (3) malformed JWT is rejected, (4) valid API key grants access, (5) revoked API key is rejected, (6) missing auth header returns 401, (7) signToken() produces a valid JWT, (8) hashApiKey() is deterministic.

Unit tests for auth routes (packages/api/src/routes/auth.ts). Test: POST /magic sends magic link (mocked email), POST /magic/verify with valid token returns JWT, POST /magic/verify with expired/used token fails, POST /register creates user, POST /login with correct/incorrect password, POST /api-keys creates key, GET /me returns current user.

Unit tests for workspace routes (packages/api/src/routes/workspaces.ts). Test: list workspaces for user, create workspace, list channels in workspace, create channel, get workspace members, create/get DM channel (idempotent), get unread counts, get presence.

Unit tests for channel routes (packages/api/src/routes/channels.ts). Test: post message, list messages with pagination, thread replies, typing indicator, add/remove/toggle reaction, get reactions, mark channel read, invite member, archive channel, get members, delete channel, edit message, delete message. Test message deduplication (same content within 60s).
Unit tests for message search (packages/api/src/routes/messages.ts). Test: search by keyword, filter by channel, filter by user, empty results.

Unit tests for task routes (packages/api/src/routes/tasks.ts). Test: create task, list tasks with filters (status, priority, assignee), update task status/fields, verify status change notifications are emitted.

Unit tests for incident routes (packages/api/src/routes/incidents.ts). Test: create incident, list with filters, get single incident, update status transitions (open -> acked -> resolved) with timestamp population, severity levels.
Unit tests for metrics routes (packages/api/src/routes/metrics.ts). Test: create metric, list with filters, get single, update, export endpoint.
Unit tests for activity routes (packages/api/src/routes/activity.ts). Test: log activity entry, query with filters, summary endpoint.
Unit tests for huddle routes (packages/api/src/routes/huddles.ts). Test: create huddle, validate participant limits.
Unit tests for upload routes (packages/api/src/routes/uploads.ts). Test: file upload stores file and returns URL, TTS audio file serving.
Unit tests for TTS route (packages/api/src/routes/tts.ts). Test with mocked OpenAI/ElevenLabs: generates audio for a message, handles missing message, handles provider errors gracefully.

Unit tests for WebSocket manager (packages/api/src/ws/manager.ts). Test: client authentication (JWT and API key), connection tracking per workspace, presence tracking (online/idle/offline transitions), publishEvent respects channel privacy (public vs private member-only), heartbeat/keepalive, idle detection, max-connections-per-user enforcement.
Unit tests for WebSocket event emission (packages/api/src/ws/events.ts). Test: emitEvent stores event in DB and calls publishEvent, all EventType values are handled.
Unit tests for packages/types — verify all exported types compile correctly and enums/constants have expected values. This is a lightweight compile-check test suite.
Unit tests for packages/web/src/lib/api.ts — mock fetch, test each API client method sends correct HTTP method, URL, headers, and body. Test error handling for non-OK responses.
Unit tests for packages/web/src/lib/store.ts — test React context provides expected defaults, and state updates propagate to consumers.

Unit tests for packages/web/src/hooks/useWebSocket.ts — mock WebSocket. Test: connects with token, reconnects with exponential backoff, deduplicates messages, recovers missed messages on reconnect, handles tab visibility changes.
Component tests for MessageInput — renders textarea, submits on Enter, shift+Enter inserts newline, calls onSend with message content, clears after send.
Component tests for MessageList — renders list of messages, displays sender name and timestamp, renders markdown content, shows thread reply counts, scrolls to bottom on new message.
Component tests for MessageReactions — displays existing reactions with counts, clicking a reaction toggles it, adding a new reaction calls API.
Component tests for ThreadPanel — renders thread parent message and replies, posting a reply adds it to the list.
Component tests for SearchPanel — renders search input, submits search query, displays results, handles empty state.
Component tests for TaskPanel — lists tasks, filters by status/priority, creating a task calls API, updating task status works.
Component tests for modals: CreateChannelModal, CreateWorkspaceModal, InviteMemberModal, HuddleModal, NewHuddleModal. Each: renders form fields, validates input, submits correctly, closes on cancel.
Component tests for AuthPage — renders email input for magic link, submits email, shows verification state, handles errors.
Component tests for MainPage — renders sidebar with channels, selecting a channel loads messages, shows workspace members, typing indicator appears when someone is typing.
Component tests for MarkdownText — renders markdown correctly (bold, italic, code blocks, links, lists).
Component test for TypingIndicator — shows names of typing users, disappears after timeout.
E2E: Auth flow — navigate to app, enter email, receive magic link (intercepted from console or mocked), click link, land on main page authenticated.
E2E: Workspace and channel creation — create a workspace, create a public channel, verify it appears in the sidebar.
E2E: Messaging — open a channel, type and send a message, verify it appears in the message list. Open the message in a thread, post a reply, verify reply appears.
E2E: Reactions — send a message, add a reaction to it, verify the reaction appears with count 1. Click the reaction to toggle it off, verify it disappears.
E2E: Real-time sync — open the app in two browser contexts (two users), have user A send a message, verify user B sees it appear without refresh.
E2E: Tasks — open the task panel, create a task with title/description/priority, verify it appears in the list. Update its status to 'done', verify it updates.
E2E: Search — send several messages with distinct keywords, use the search panel to search for one keyword, verify only matching messages appear in results.
E2E: DM flow — create a DM with another user, send a message, verify it's delivered. Verify the DM appears in the sidebar.

Add CI integration: create a GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/test.yml) that runs 'pnpm test' on push/PR. Set up a PostgreSQL service container for API tests. Run Playwright tests with the Playwright GitHub Action.
